transcript: Speaker A: English nerchukovadaniki 8 weeks nunchi try chesthunnav, kani how are you thappa em nerchukolekapothunnav. Nenu English nerchukovadaniki play store lo chala apps use chesanu, kani last lo nammakam vachindi SpeakX app medha. Indhulo unde AI teacher mana books lo unde kashatamaina English kakunda, normal daily life lo use chese simple English thone nerpisthundhi. Dhini use chesi 1 week lo manchi English nerchukovachu and 1 month lo perfect English matladochu. E app yentha simple ante neene kadu, nathoti patu konni kotla mandhi use chesthu 1 week lo perfect English nerchukuntunaru. Inka late endhuku, anni apps ni vadhilesi perfect English nerchukovalante mana SpeakX app ni download chesukondi. [Speaker A: You've been trying to learn English for 8 weeks, but you haven't been able to learn anything except 'how are you'. I used many apps in the Play Store to learn English, but in the end, I got trust in the SpeakX app. The AI teacher in this teaches you with simple English used in normal daily life, instead of the difficult English found in our books. By using this, you can learn good English in 1 week and speak perfect English in 1 month. This app is so simple that not just me, but crores of people along with me are using it and learning perfect English in 1 week. Why delay anymore? Leave all other apps and download our SpeakX app to learn perfect English.]
on_screen_text: ENGLISH NERCHUKOVADANIKI 8 WEEKS NUNCHI TRY CHESTHUNAV [Trying to learn English for 8 weeks] KANI HOW R U THAPPA EM NERCHUKOLEKAPOTHUNAV [But you haven't been able to learn anything except how are you] NENU ENGLISH NERCHUKOVADANIKI PLAYSTORE LO CHALA APPS USE CHESANU [I used many apps in Playstore to learn English] KANI LAST LO NAMAKAM VACHINDHI SPEAK X APP MEDHA [But in the end, I got trust in Speak X app] ENDHULO UNDE AI TEACHER [The AI teacher in this] MANA BOOKS LO UNDE KASHATAMAINA ENGLISH KAKUNDA [Instead of the difficult English in our books] NORMAL DAILY LIFE LO USE CHESE SIMPLE ENGLISH THONE NERPISTHUNDHI [Teaches with simple English used in normal daily life] DHINI USE CHESI 1 WEEK LO MANCHI ENGLISH NERCHUKOVACHU [By using this, you can learn good English in 1 week] AND 1 MONTH LO PERFECT ENGLISH MATLADOCHU [And speak perfect English in 1 month] E APP YENTHA SIMPLE ANTE [This app is so simple that] NEENE KADU NATHOTI PATU [Not just me, along with me] KONNI KOTLA MANDHI [Crores of people] USE CHESTHU 1 WEEK LO PERFECT ENGLISH NERCHUKUNTUNARU [Are using and learning perfect English in 1 week] INKA LATE ENDHUKU [Why delay anymore] ANNI APPS NI VADHILESI [Leave all apps] PERFECT ENGLISH NERCHUKOVALANTE [If you want to learn perfect English] MANA SPEAK X APP NI DOWNLOAD CHESUKONDI [Download our Speak X app]
summary: A young woman shares her struggle of trying to learn English for weeks with no results until she found the SpeakX app. She highlights how its AI teacher uses simple, daily-life English rather than complex bookish language, enabling quick learning. She encourages viewers to download SpeakX to speak perfect English within a month, joining millions of other successful users.
